ciss_manual_review.data_source: CISS Analytical User's Manuals (2017 & 2020) — codebook level
ciss_manual_review.csv_unavailability_reason: HTTP 404 on all attempted static.nhtsa.gov URL patterns; NHTSA portal returns HTTP 403 (Akamai CDN). Browser or FTP download required — not automatable.

deltav.label: HIGHEST DELTA V TOTAL (WinSMASH estimate, kph)
deltav.fill_rate_note: UNKNOWN: actual CISS CSV not obtained. DVBASIS=0 (Not Inspected) is a valid code in both 2017 and 2020 manuals; fraction of vehicles with DVBASIS=0 cannot be determined without data.
deltav.source_2017: CISS 2017 Analytical User's Manual, DOT HS 812 803 (June 2020 update). URL: https://crashstats.nhtsa.dot.gov/Api/Public/Publication/812803
deltav.source_2020: CISS 2020 Analytical User's Manual, DOT HS 812 958 (June 2020). URL: https://crashstats.nhtsa.dot.gov/Api/Public/Publication/812958

coordinates.crash_dataset_vars_note: ALCINV CAIS CASEID CASENO CASENUMBER CASEWGT CATEGORY CINJSEV CINJURED CISS CONFIG CRASHMONTH CRASHTIME CRASHYEAR CTREAT DAYOFWEEK DRGINV EVENTS MANCOLL PSU PSUSTRAT SUMMARY VEHICLES VERSION — no coordinate columns
coordinates.edge_distance_note: EDGEDISTX/Y/Z (added in 2020 GV dataset) are physical measurements of distance from the road edge in centimetres, NOT geographic coordinates.  Cannot be used for AADT spatial join.
coordinates.geographic_resolution: PSU (county or county group); 24 PSUs in CISS
coordinates.source_2017: CISS 2017 Analytical User's Manual, DOT HS 812 803 (June 2020 update). URL: https://crashstats.nhtsa.dot.gov/Api/Public/Publication/812803
coordinates.source_2020: CISS 2020 Analytical User's Manual, DOT HS 812 958 (June 2020). URL: https://crashstats.nhtsa.dot.gov/Api/Public/Publication/812958

esc.label: ELECTRONIC STABILITY CONTROL (ESC) — VIN-decoded via vPIC
esc.fill_rate_note: UNKNOWN: actual CISS CSV not obtained. CISS stores full 17-char VINs (unlike FARS which truncates to 12 chars), so vPIC decode should succeed at a higher rate than FARS. CRSS vpicdecode.csv (same vPIC pipeline) shows 28.3% 'Standard' fill (fill_rate computed 2026-07-14 from CRSS2021); CISS fill rate may differ due to vehicle composition differences. Whether 'Not Equipped' is encoded separately from empty/null is not determinable without actual data.
esc.source_2017: CISS 2017 Analytical User's Manual, DOT HS 812 803 (June 2020 update). URL: https://crashstats.nhtsa.dot.gov/Api/Public/Publication/812803

CAIS.label: MAXIMUM KNOWN AIS IN THIS CRASH

CISS_col.label: MAXIMUM ISS SCORE IN THIS CASE

VAIS.label: MAXIMUM AIS SEVERITY FOR THIS VEHICLE

injury.injury_spectrum: K through O (full MAIS range); superior to FARS (fatal only)
injury.source_2017: CISS 2017 Analytical User's Manual, DOT HS 812 803 (June 2020 update). URL: https://crashstats.nhtsa.dot.gov/Api/Public/Publication/812803

sample_size.note: CISS is a nationally representative probability sample of police-reported crashes involving at least one tow-away passenger vehicle; 24 PSUs (county groups); sample weighted to represent all such US crashes.

year_2017.source: CISS 2017 Analytical User's Manual, DOT HS 812 803 (June 2020 update). URL: https://crashstats.nhtsa.dot.gov/Api/Public/Publication/812803

year_2020.source: CISS 2020 Analytical User's Manual, DOT HS 812 958 (June 2020). URL: https://crashstats.nhtsa.dot.gov/Api/Public/Publication/812958

weights.psu_col: PSU (Primary Sampling Unit = county or county group)
weights.jackknife_cols: JKWGT1 through JKWGT24 (24 adjusted jackknife replicates)
weights.source: CISS 2017 Analytical User's Manual, DOT HS 812 803 (June 2020 update). URL: https://crashstats.nhtsa.dot.gov/Api/Public/Publication/812803

ciss_manual_review.tier1_feasibility: CONDITIONAL: CISS records DVTOTAL (P1=delta-V) and ElectronicStabilityControl in VINDERIVED (P2=ESC). However (1) DVTOTAL fill rate is UNKNOWN — DVBASIS=0 may apply to a substantial fraction; (2) ESC fill rate is UNKNOWN — CRSS (same pipeline) shows only 28.3% 'Standard', rest empty/Not Applicable; (3) complete-case sample with both DVTOTAL and ESC observed may be too small for causal identification. Feasibility cannot be confirmed without actual CISS CSV data.
ciss_manual_review.tier2_feasibility: NOT FEASIBLE: CISS does not release GPS coordinates in public data. EDGEDISTX/Y/Z (2020 GV) are centimetre distances from road edge, not geographic coordinates, and cannot support AADT spatial join. Tier-2 requires LATITUDE/LONGITUD for IPSW exposure model — absent.
primary_sources: CISS 2017 Analytical User's Manual, DOT HS 812 803 (June 2020 update). URL: https://crashstats.nhtsa.dot.gov/Api/Public/Publication/812803
CISS 2020 Analytical User's Manual, DOT HS 812 958 (June 2020). URL: https://crashstats.nhtsa.dot.gov/Api/Public/Publication/812958
